nasb.text: You have bought Me not sweet cane with money, Nor have you filled Me with the fat of your sacrifices; Rather you have burdened Me with your sins, You have wearied Me with your iniquities.

esv.text: You have not bought me sweet cane with money, or satisfied me with the fat of your sacrifices. But you have burdened me with your sins; you have wearied me with your iniquities.

cnv.text: 你沒有用銀子為我買菖蒲， 也沒有用祭物的脂肪使我飽足； 相反地，你用你的罪使我勞累， 你用你的罪孽使我厭煩。

ccb.text: 你并没有花钱买菖蒲献给我， 也没有用祭物的脂肪满足我， 反而使我因你的罪恶而受累， 因你的过犯而烦扰。

csbs.text: 你没有用银子为我买菖蒲， 也没有用祭物的脂油使我满足， 不过我却因你的罪恶有重负， 因你的罪孽而厌倦。
